observation: Drinking water contamination detected — water purifier non-functional, stored water uncovered
Broken windows in dormitory block B — glass shards on floor near beds
facility_response: Windows repaired on 2026-04-06. Glass cleaned and replaced with safety glass.

observation: Kitchen hygiene below standards — food stored without covers, expired provisions found
Night warden absent for 3 consecutive days — no substitute arranged
facility_response: New night warden appointed from 2026-04-07. Attendance register updated.

observation: Fire extinguishers expired — last serviced 18 months ago, no evacuation drill conducted
Essential medicines stockout — 12 critical drugs unavailable, 3 vials past expiry date
Operation theatre AC non-functional — temperature exceeds safe limits for procedures
facility_response: AC unit replaced on 2026-04-08. Temperature logs maintained since.

observation: Biomedical waste segregation not followed — coloured bins missing in 3 wards
facility_response: Ordered new bins, expected delivery by 2026-04-12

observation: Kitchen exhaust fan non-functional — heavy smoke accumulation during cooking. Gas cylinder storage area lacks ventilation.
Toilets in Block A have no running water after 8 PM. Septic tank overflow observed near the rear compound wall.
Ceiling plaster peeling in dormitory room 4 — risk of falling debris on students during sleep.
facility_response: Plaster repair completed on 2026-04-10. Room was vacated during work and re-inspected by warden.

observation: Attendance register not maintained for support staff (cook, watchman, sweeper). No duty roster displayed.
facility_response: Duty roster board installed at warden office. Biometric attendance started from 2026-04-09.

observation: Electrical wiring exposed near bathroom entrance in Block B. No MCB/ELCB protection installed on geyser circuit.
facility_response: Submitted request to PWD for electrical rewiring. Geyser disconnected until repair.

observation: Leaking roof in study hall — water seepage during rain damages books and furniture. Multiple ceiling tiles missing.
Menu chart not displayed. Milk and curd stored without refrigeration — spoilage risk in summer.
Compound wall broken at two points — unauthorized entry possible. CCTV cameras in corridor non-functional.
facility_response: Temporary barricade erected on 2026-04-09. CCTV vendor contacted for repair — expected by 2026-04-15.

observation: Girls' washroom has no door locks on 4 out of 8 stalls. Soap and sanitary pad dispenser empty.
facility_response: Door locks fixed on 2026-04-08. Dispensers refilled and supply contract renewed.

observation: Only 1 warden for 120 students — staff-to-student ratio below prescribed norms. No female security guard at night.
facility_response: Requested additional warden posting from District Welfare Office.

observation: X-ray machine non-functional for 2 weeks — patients referred to private diagnostic centres. UPS for ICU monitors not working.
Essential drug stockout: Amoxicillin, Metformin, ORS packets unavailable. Insulin stored outside cold chain — temperature log missing.
Biomedical waste not segregated in labour room and casualty ward. Yellow and red bins interchanged. No TSPCB authorization certificate displayed.
facility_response: Correct coloured bins procured and placed. Staff awareness session conducted on 2026-04-08. TSPCB certificate renewal applied.

observation: No specialist doctor (gynaecologist) posted — position vacant for 4 months. ANM conducting deliveries without MBBS supervision.
facility_response: DM&HO informed. Specialist from CHC Alair visits twice weekly as interim arrangement.

observation: Fire exit on first floor blocked with stored furniture. Emergency assembly point not marked. No fire drill conducted in last 12 months.
facility_response: Fire exit cleared immediately. Assembly point marking done on 2026-04-07. Fire drill scheduled for 2026-04-20.

observation: Patient discharge summary register incomplete — 40% of entries missing diagnosis and follow-up instructions. OPD register not updated since 2026-03-28.
facility_response: Backlog entries completed. Assigned dedicated data entry operator from 2026-04-09.
